case_title: MARK E HERNANDEZ VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, MARK E AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, MARK E
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-30-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFT.
COPY OF NOTICE RE CHALLENGE OF VENUE, SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2007 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS, CLERK S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, MARK E RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $5.20 INTEREST, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $535.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
